question: Based on the stacked bar chart showing quarterly platform engagement indicators, what can be concluded about overall performance across the quarters?

options.A: Q4 has the best overall performance because it has the highest combined bar height.
options.B: Q1 clearly has the best overall performance because it has the lowest total height.
options.C: Q3 clearly has the best overall performance because its metrics are perfectly balanced.
options.D: Overall performance cannot be accurately compared across quarters because the chart stacks indicators with different units that cannot be meaningfully added together.

explanation: The chart stacks unrelated metrics (Page Views, Server Uptime, etc.) into a single total. These metrics have different units and meanings (e.g., counts, temperatures, consumption), so adding them together creates a meaningless sum. The stacked height cannot be used to assess overall performance. Only individual metric comparisons are valid.
